error_signature: element does not exist in the page
title: Element not found during custom code execution
symptom: The script fails to find the element '#mynetwork' when executed, resulting in errors. This occurs because the script runs before the element is available in the DOM.
applies_when: Custom code is executed in the head section
The element '#mynetwork' is not yet rendered
not_this_if: The script is executed after the element is rendered
The element is present in the DOM
root_cause: Scripts placed in the head section run before the body is fully loaded, leading to attempts to access elements that do not yet exist in the DOM. This results in errors when trying to manipulate or reference those elements.
fix_steps: Wrap the code in a function that waits for the DOM to be fully loaded.
Use a MutationObserver or bind the execution to a user action to ensure the element is present before accessing it.
agent_instruction: Ensure the custom code waits for the DOM to be fully loaded before executing.
